---
pagetitle: "Projects — Your Name"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

<!-- ========== PROJECTS HERO ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white style="padding-top: 6rem;"}
::: {.section-wide}

[Portfolio]{.section-label}

## Projects {.section-heading}

Each project represents a real challenge I tackled — from data collection and exploration through model development to production deployment. Click through to explore the code and live demos.
{.section-desc}

:::
:::


<!-- ========== FEATURED PROJECTS ========== -->
::: {.section}
::: {.section-wide}

[Highlights]{.section-label}

### Featured Projects

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i>
:::

### Predictive Analytics Platform

Built an end-to-end ML pipeline for customer churn prediction, integrating data from 5 sources. The model reduced churn rate by 18% and saved $2M annually through proactive intervention strategies.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Scikit-learn]{.tag} [AWS SageMaker]{.tag} [Docker]{.tag} [Airflow]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-cpu"></i>
:::

### NLP Document Classifier

Developed a transformer-based document classification system processing 50K+ documents daily with 95% accuracy. Fine-tuned BERT on domain-specific corpora and deployed via Kubernetes.

::: {.tag-row}
[PyTorch]{.tag} [Transformers]{.tag} [FastAPI]{.tag} [K8s]{.tag} [MLflow]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Paper](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .orange}
<i class="bi bi-bar-chart-line"></i>
:::

### Real-time KPI Dashboard

Designed interactive dashboards visualizing KPIs across 5 business units, enabling data-driven decisions for 200+ stakeholders. Integrated with live data feeds and automated alerting.

::: {.tag-row}
[R Shiny]{.tag} [D3.js]{.tag} [PostgreSQL]{.tag} [REST API]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== MORE PROJECTS ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-wide}

[More Work]{.section-label}

### Additional Projects

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .purple}
<i class="bi bi-image"></i>
:::

### Computer Vision Quality Inspector

Built a CNN-based defect detection system for manufacturing, achieving 99.2% accuracy in identifying product defects on the assembly line, replacing manual inspection.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [TensorFlow]{.tag} [OpenCV]{.tag} [Edge AI]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .red}
<i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
:::

### Fraud Detection Engine

Designed an ensemble model (XGBoost + Neural Network) for real-time fraud detection on financial transactions, processing 10K+ transactions per second with <50ms latency.

::: {.tag-row}
[XGBoost]{.tag} [Kafka]{.tag} [Spark Streaming]{.tag} [Redis]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides"></i> Slides](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .teal}
<i class="bi bi-chat-dots"></i>
:::

### Conversational AI Chatbot

Created a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) chatbot for internal knowledge management. The system indexes 100K+ company documents and provides context-aware answers.

::: {.tag-row}
[LangChain]{.tag} [OpenAI]{.tag} [Pinecone]{.tag} [FastAPI]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Demo](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
:::

### Geospatial Analysis Toolkit

Open-source Python library for geospatial data analysis, including spatial clustering, interpolation, and visualization. 500+ GitHub stars and used by researchers worldwide.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [GeoPandas]{.tag} [Folium]{.tag} [PyPI]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Docs](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-activity"></i>
:::

### Time Series Forecasting Engine

Built a forecasting system combining ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM models for demand planning. Achieved 12% improvement over baseline and automated model selection.

::: {.tag-row}
[Prophet]{.tag} [LSTM]{.tag} [Optuna]{.tag} [MLflow]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .orange}
<i class="bi bi-people"></i>
:::

### A/B Testing Framework

Developed a reusable Bayesian A/B testing framework with automatic sample size calculation, early stopping rules, and interactive result visualization for product teams.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.tag} [Stan]{.tag} [Shiny]{.tag} [Bayesian Stats]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Write-up](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== CTA ========== -->
::: {.section .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

## Interested in Collaborating? {.section-heading}

I'm always open to discussing new projects, research collaborations, or job opportunities.
{.section-desc style="margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:center;"}

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Get in Touch](contact.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com){.btn-outline-custom target="_blank"}
:::

:::
:::
